title: Pass 5.C.4: ferrotorch-tokenize strftime_now hardcoded empty string
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-tokenize audit, STUB.

src/lib.rs:247-250 — strftime_now is a hardcoded stub returning String::new(). Comment ('callers wanting real dates should preprocess') openly acknowledges the stub. Llama 3.1 system templates that reference strftime_now('%d %b %Y') silently render an empty date — wrong output, no error.

Acceptance:
- Implement strftime_now using chrono::Local::now().format(...) (chrono is already a workspace dep)
- Fixture that asserts a non-empty rendered date for a Llama 3.1 system message containing strftime_now.
